reviews.comment:
Muy limpio los baños. Y la atención del personal excelente

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms were very clean. And the staff were excellent.

reviews.comment:
Muy mala atención en la parte de despensa y quiosco, atienden de pésimo humor y la mayoría de las veces no se puede abonar con tarjeta de debito o mercado pago ya que no le funciona el sistema. Solo efectivo.... Por el resto bien...

(Translated by Google)
Very poor service in the convenience store and kiosk area. The staff is in a terrible mood, and most of the time you can't pay with a debit card or Mercado Pago because their system isn't working. Cash only. Otherwise, it's fine.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNscDgtcXBRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Es recomendable parar cuando la ruta no esté cargada. Muy buena panaderia y buen café el restaurant es muy bueno, eso si, ir temprano para no tener demoras.

(Translated by Google)
It's advisable to stop when the road isn't busy. The bakery and coffee are excellent, and the restaurant is very good too; just be sure to go early to avoid delays.
